channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.description: Gregory Bovino, the former head of President Trump's Customs and Border Protection, publicly criticized Department of Homeland Security Secretary Markwayne Mullin following a dismissive response to hi...

item.title: Jeffrey Wernick Critiques Modern U.S. Foreign Policy and Its Departure from Founding Principles
item.description: Jeffrey Wernick delivers a thorough critique of modern American foreign policy, arguing that the United States has strayed far from the principles its founders emphasized. Drawing on George Washington...

item.title: William Ruto Engages Communities Directly Ahead of 2027 Election

item.title: Protests in Nanyuki Over Proposed Ebola Isolation Facility Escalate into Clashes with Police
item.description: On Monday, Nanyuki town witnessed tense scenes as hundreds of residents protested against a proposed Ebola quarantine and isolation facility at Laikipia Airbase. Initially, the demonstrations were pea...

item.title: Former GOP strategist criticizes Trump’s Fox News spelling remark as sign of decline
item.description: A recent Fox News interview featuring U.S. President Donald Trump has sparked political commentary and criticism after he made an unusual remark about the spelling of the word “dumb.” During the segme...

item.description: Former Australian environment minister Peter Garrett has announced his involvement in an independent inquiry examining the Aukus defence agreement, a major security partnership between Australia, the ...

item.title: Woman reports husband for allegedly forging documents to claim newborn daughter for mother-in-law after childbirth
item.description: The story follows a woman who endured years of emotional pain and repeated pregnancy losses before finally conceiving and giving birth to her “miracle baby” after an extremely difficult 18-hour labour...

item.title: Successful Debut of China's CZ-12B Rocket for Commercial Satellite Deployment
item.description: On June 1, 2026, the Chinese CZ-12B rocket made its successful maiden flight from the Dongfeng Commercial Aerospace Zone near the Jiuquan Satellite Launch Center. The two-stage, kerosene-fueled rocket...

item.title: South Africa on track to meet 2030 climate emission targets
item.description: South Africa is showing promising progress towards meeting its climate goals, aiming to limit greenhouse gas emissions to 420 million tonnes of CO2-equivalent by 2030. Most of the country’s emissions ...

item.title: Mary Nolan: Kenny Chesney's Longtime Partner and Animal Lover
item.description: Mary Nolan has been Kenny Chesney's partner since 2012, though the couple has never publicly confirmed marriage. Both share a deep love for animals and have adopted rescue dogs together. Despite being...
